trialWarning.title: ⏳ Your Pro trial ends in {{days}} day{{plural}}
trialWarning.message: Your free Pro trial expires on {{date}}. Upgrade to a paid plan to keep your 5 service slots, Pro AI, and reduced commission.

trialExpired.title: 🔔 Your free Pro trial has ended
trialExpired.message: Your 90-day launch trial is over. You have been moved to the Free plan (1 service, 8% commission). Upgrade to Pro or Business to restore all features.

nudgeNoServices.title: ✨ Ready to start earning?
nudgeNoServices.message: You haven't posted a service yet. Open the app and let AI suggest the best services for your skills and location — it only takes 2 minutes!

nudgeInactive.title: 📈 Boost your visibility
nudgeInactive.message: You haven't received a booking in 7 days. Our AI has found new opportunities in your area — check them out in the AI Radar on your dashboard!

booking.completed: Your booking has been marked as completed.
booking.reminder: You have a booking coming up soon.
